frameworks.name: Local-first knowledge workflow
frameworks.note: This POC preserves metadata and publication gates without replacing vault, notebook, or publishing UX.

frameworks.name: Publication preflight governance
frameworks.note: Draft exclusion, metadata checks, and human review are explicit before publishing.

controls.risk: notes lose source context during ingestion
draft notes leak into publication output

gaps.nextEvidence: Have a consumer project read the manifest and produce vault-local output.

Attach project-specific editorial rules and acceptance criteria.
